title: Payment API timeout
fix: Add exponential backoff and retry queue

title: Database connection exhaustion
fix: Increase DB pool size and optimize queries

title: Authentication service outage
fix: Rotate certificates and restart auth service

title: Kafka consumer failure
fix: Reconnect consumer and validate broker health

title: Inventory synchronization failure
fix: Retry synchronization and inspect replication lag

title: API latency spike
fix: Scale API instances and enable caching

title: Disk storage saturation
fix: Rotate logs and increase storage capacity

title: Redis cache outage
fix: Restart Redis and increase memory allocation

title: Email notification failure
fix: Fail over to backup SMTP provider

title: CPU utilization spike
fix: Terminate faulty job and optimize workload scheduling
